spicedb.insecure.label: Insecure Connection
spicedb.insecure.help: Allow insecure gRPC to localhost (dev mode)

graphiti.endpoint.label: Graphiti Endpoint
graphiti.endpoint.help: Graphiti REST server HTTP base URL

graphiti.defaultGroupId.label: Graphiti Default Group ID
graphiti.defaultGroupId.help: Default Graphiti group_id for memory isolation

graphiti.uuidPollIntervalMs.label: UUID Poll Interval (ms)
graphiti.uuidPollIntervalMs.help: Polling interval for resolving episode UUIDs after store (default: 3000)

graphiti.uuidPollMaxAttempts.label: UUID Poll Max Attempts
graphiti.uuidPollMaxAttempts.help: Max polling attempts; total timeout = interval × attempts (default: 30 = 90s)

graphiti.requestTimeoutMs.label: Request Timeout (ms)
graphiti.requestTimeoutMs.help: HTTP request timeout for Graphiti REST calls (default: 30000)

subjectType.label: Subject Type
subjectType.help: SpiceDB subject object type (agent or person)

subjectId.label: Subject ID
subjectId.help: SpiceDB subject ID for the current agent/person

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

customInstructions.label: Custom Extraction Instructions
customInstructions.help: Natural language rules for what the backend should extract from conversations

maxCaptureMessages.label: Max Capture Messages
maxCaptureMessages.help: Maximum number of recent messages to include in auto-capture (default: 10)
